<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract; use Pest\Mutate\Contracts\Mutator; use Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Concerns\HasName; use PhpParser\Node; abstract class AbstractMutator implements Mutator { public const SET = ''; public const DESCRIPTION = ''; public const DIFF = ''; use HasName; public static function can(Node $node): bool { return in_array($node::class, static::nodesToHandle(), true); } public static function set(): string { return static::SET; } public static function description(): string { return static::DESCRIPTION; } public static function diff(): string { return static::DIFF; } }
